STREAM_WATCHDOG.OFFLINE_PLAYLIST_NAME_DESC: Name of the Volumio playlist to play when your stream fails. Create it in Browse → Playlists before any failure occurs.
STREAM_WATCHDOG.STREAM_CHECK_INTERVAL_DESC: How often to probe the stream URL while watching. Minimum: 15
STREAM_WATCHDOG.RESTORE_CHECK_INTERVAL_DESC: How often to probe the stream URL while in fallback mode. Minimum: 30
STREAM_WATCHDOG.AUTO_RESTORE_DESC: Automatically resume the original stream when it comes back
